internalSplitPolicy.publicImportContract: Consumers import package-level styles/index.css files only.

imports.notes: ui-core owns shared --vf-* primitive and semantic tokens, reset, themes, density, typography, motion, layers, utilities, and accessibility helpers.
ui-components consumes --vf-* variables and owns vf-* component classes split by component family internally.
ui-data-grid owns udg-* classes and --udg-* variables. The grid should work with fallback values but aligns best when ui-core is imported.

rules: Import ui-core styles before ui-components styles.
Import ui-components styles before ui-data-grid styles.
Do not import internal package CSS module files directly.
Override canonical --vf-* semantic roles for app-wide theme changes.
Use --udg-* only for genuinely grid-specific changes.
Do not edit package CSS directly in consuming apps.
React and native element renderers must consume the same canonical --vf-* semantic roles.
Light DOM is the default for ui-elements; Shadow DOM requires an approved component-level exception.
